articles.title: Keegan reveals stage four cancer diagnosis
articles.summary: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan reveals he has stage four cancer.

articles.title: Record-holder Milner retires after 24-year career
articles.summary: Former England international James Milner announces his retirement after a 24-year Premier League career.

articles.title: Earps & Leon poised to join London City Lionesses
articles.summary: Former England goalkeeper Mary Earps and Spain defender Mapi Leon are on the verge of joining London City Lionesses this summer.

articles.title: Palace set to hold talks with Lens boss Sage
articles.summary: Lens manager Pierre Sage is set to hold talks with Crystal Palace as the Premier League club look to appoint Oliver Glasner's replacement.

articles.title: Any team would be lucky to have McCabe - Ward
articles.summary: Republic of Ireland manager Carla Ward says Katie McCabe would be a "good fit for any team in the world" as the defender prepares to make the move to Chelsea.

articles.title: Watch as Celtic beat Rangers in Women's Scottish Cup final
articles.summary: Watch as a Morgan Cross goal is enough to give Celtic victory over Rangers in the Women's Scottish Cup final despite a red card for Emma Lawton.

articles.title: Wolves rejection to double Champions League winner: Vitinha's rise to top
articles.summary: BBC Sport NI charts Vitinha's rise from an unsuccessful loan spell at Wolves to helping PSG win the Champions League twice in a row.

articles.title: The football fans who went to a World Cup and loved it so much, they stayed
articles.summary: A new documentary follows a group of Wolves fans who moved to the US after the Mexico World Cup.

articles.title: From £70 a week to Premier League record 24 years later - Milner retires
articles.summary: James Milner has broken the Premier League appearance record, 24 years after making his debut as a 16-year-old.

articles.title: Full NI squad reports for duty for friendly games
articles.summary: Northern Ireland manager Michael O'Neill reports that all 23 members of his squad have arrived fit and well for the forthcoming friendlies against Guinea and France.

articles.title: Vallejo hit with huge fine for 'unacceptable' comments about female umpire
articles.summary: Adolfo Daniel Vallejo has been fined nearly £50,000 for saying his French Open match should not have been umpired by a woman.

articles.summary: James Milner has announced his retirement from football at the age of 40.

articles.title: Sacked Slot says Liverpool connection 'goes beyond football'
articles.summary: Arne Slot has said the connection he shares with Liverpool and the club's fans "goes beyond football".

articles.title: 'One of the best young wingers in the game!' | Diomande or Barcola to replace Salah?
articles.summary: Speaking on the Transfer Talk Podcast, Henry Winter and Sam Tighe discuss whether Yan Diomande or Bradley Barcola could join Liverpool this summer as a replacement for Mohamed Salah.

articles.summary: When Roly Gregoire quit football in 1980 after suffering a knee injury, he had faced so much racism that he could not bear to watch football for many years.

articles.summary: Former Super League and international head coach John Kear has died aged 71.

articles.title: Goalkeeper tactical timeouts to be banned at World Cup
articles.summary: Players at the 2026 World Cup will be stopped from going to the technical area to talk to coaches when goalkeepers are injured.
